tools.name: list-my-projects
tools.description:
List construction projects the user can access within a team.

**Use this tool ONLY when the user wants to switch project or has no
saved current project.** If `check-current-project` returns a
saved facility_key, do NOT call this tool — call the analysis tool
directly with no arguments.

tools.name: ask-about-project-data
tools.description:
Query the construction project database using natural language (Text-to-SQL).
Converts natural language into SQL to retrieve captures, annotations, progress metrics,
schedules, and other project records.
Pass the user's question as-is without modification.
For trade visibility, use `analyze-progress

tools.name: set-focus-project
tools.description:
Save the user's current team and project so subsequent tool calls can omit
the `team_domain` / `facility_key` arguments.

Args:
    team_domain: Team domain to remember (required unless `clear=True`).
    facility_key: Facility key to remember (required unless `clear=True`).

tools.name: check-current-project
tools.description: Return the currently saved team_domain and facility_key for this user.

tools.name: search-site-photos
tools.description:
Search 360° captures (panoramic site photos) by visual content analysis.
Searches what is VISUALLY SEEN in 360° captures — safety hazards, quality issues, work types,
objects, equipment, materials, and physical site conditions.
Do NOT use for capture counts or statistics — use `ask-about-project-dat

tools.name: analyze-progress-and-forecasts
tools.description:
Analyze Work In Place (WIP) progress from SiteInsights(SI) — completion
rates, delays, and forecasts.
Generates a progress report: overall completion, progress by category/vendor/level,
delay analysis, and estimated completion dates.
**WORKFLOW:**
- **Default**: call this tool with NO arguments. The

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: ask-about-project-data, search-site-photos · Private data: ask-about-project-data · Public sink: ask-about-project-data · Destructive: ask-about-project-data, set-focus-project, search-site-photos, analyze-progress-and-forecasts.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: ask-about-project-data, search-site-photos · Private data: ask-about-project-data · Public sink: ask-about-project-data · Destructive: ask-about-project-data, set-focus-project, search-site-photos, analyze-progress-and-forecasts

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
